## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally and it passed
- [ ] New exercises follow `data/schema.json` (kebab-case `id`, valid `pattern`)
- [ ] New figures are SVG `viewBox 0 0 120 120`, no external refs
- [ ] Data and figures I added are dedicated to the public domain under **CC0**
- [ ] I checked the app still runs (`npm run dev`, load the sample)
